title: Provide array needs an array index warning

features.name: 1-bit unpacked array used as scalar on RHS without index
features.description: Code should include a 1-bit unpacked array assigned to an indexed element of the same array on the RHS without an index subscript, so that a missing-index lint diagnostic can be triggered

features.name: multi-bit unpacked array used as scalar on RHS without index
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit unpacked array used on the RHS of a non-blocking assignment without an index subscript, where the missing subscript causes a cpp compile error in the generated C++ code

features.name: for-loop with indexed LHS and unindexed array RHS in clocked always block
features.description: Code should include a for-loop inside a clocked always block where the LHS uses an integer loop index to subscript an unpacked array but the RHS references the same unpacked array without any index
